content.en:
Whoa!!

Those generals came out of the Dongmu River one after another, and they knew that the battle was over.

When they came out and saw the corpse of a king-level being, and even the corpse of an emperor-level creature, they were all shocked.

"Elder Tian, you killed an emperor?"

Those generals were dumbfounded, and the general-level Sui was even more speechless in surprise.

This partner of the same age as him is now able to kill the emperor level, which may be stronger than the ancestor of the Eagle Department, Elder He!

"You guys go fix the formation first!"

Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes!"

The people answered.

And Ye Tian took away these king-level and emperor-level treasures, and then quickly rushed to the Eagle Department.

He had also contacted the Eagle Department before, and learned that there was also a battle on the Eagle Department's side, and there was an emperor-level invasion.

In an instant, he understood that the insect department had invited other emperors to drag He Lao and specially come to kill him.

Therefore, he wanted to rush over and directly help He Lao deal with that emperor.

Anyway, if you can't hide it, then you can simply show your strength directly and kill another emperor-level existence. 04 In a few breaths, Ye Tian rushed to the Eagle Department through the ultimate arcane technique of Nian Xuan.

......

"Why hasn't this guy sent a message yet?"

Bin was puzzled.

According to the agreement, as long as Gu Tu kills Ye Tian, he will be summoned, and he can retreat.

According to Gu Tu's strength, killing Ye Tian was very fast, and it wouldn't be long before he would have succeeded according to the time.

But now, there is no breath at all.

In order to stop He Lao, he went all out, if something went wrong on the Gu map's side, it would be funny.

That's when it happened.

A figure emerged.

"God, what are you doing here?"

He Lao asked.

"Old He, I'll help you deal with this emperor. He cooperated with the Insect Ministry, and the Emperor of the Insect Department went to attack and kill me. "

Ye Tian said lightly.

"You are the Heavenly Elder of the Eagle Ministry, how could you not have fallen?"

Bin was shocked.

Ye Tian appeared here, what does that mean, the Gu map of the insect department failed, but even if it fails, you have to notify him!

Unless Gu Tu is dead.

"Impossible, Gu Tu is also an emperor level, even if his strength is weaker than mine, but Gu Tu has a terrible hole card, he can die with me, I can't kill him, how can this guy kill Gu Tu? Even if Gu Tu is dead, he shouldn't be able to survive!"

Bin was puzzled and didn't know what was going on.

However.

Ye Tian used the top ultimate arcane art, the blade of the arrow, and Bin in the battle with He Lao couldn't dodge for a while, so he could only choose to resist hard.

Burst!

Bin's body was pierced by the light of Aromu's blade, and he was directly hit hard.

This blow also made Bin completely enlightened, no wonder Gu Tu would fall, it turned out that Ye Tian's strength couldn't be measured with ordinary common sense at all, this was too demonic.

Ye Tian's physical body is too terrifying, obviously he is a king-level, but the strength of his physical body is too incredible.

After all, Ye Tian cultivated his own self-created Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Dao, as well as the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Body, and through the comprehension of the Ancient Demon-level Life Pattern, he transformed his physical body, and his current physical strength was no less than that of an ordinary emperor-level.

In addition, the self-created top-notch ultimate arcane Arro Mu's blade, such a top-notch ultimate arcane, where can Bin compare, he will only be an ordinary ultimate arcane, and it is full of loopholes.

"Run!"

Bin immediately had the idea that if he didn't run away, he would fall.

He Lao said excitedly.

Bin can intercept him, and he can intercept Bin naturally.

In an instant, countless ultimate particles distorted, turning this piece of ultimate void into a special world, making it impossible for Bin to escape.

Followed by.

Ye Tian and He Lao teamed up to attack Bin, and in an instant, his injuries were even more serious.

Soon, Bin played all kinds of hole cards, but it still didn't work.

Soon after, Bin's body was shattered again and again, and finally could not be recovered, and the ultimate particle was crushed, lost its vitality, and completely fell here.

"God, your strength has actually reached the emperor level, and it is even more powerful than me!"

He Lao was full of emotion.

"I'm just cultivating harder. Ye Tian said modestly.

Cultivation efforts?

If you work hard to cultivate, you can achieve this step, and everyone will be able to reach the emperor level.

However, it could be seen from this battle that Ye Tian's strength was even more terrifying than he imagined.

This is really wicked!!

Of course, He Lao did not announce Ye Tian's strength, and he did not even allow the clansmen to leak out.

Otherwise, Ye Tian's demons might cause some unnecessary trouble.

"God, did you kill Gu Tu?"

He Lao asked.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded.

"The Insect Department is a trouble, they don't have the Emperor level now, we can take the opportunity to destroy the Insect Department!" He Lao proposed.

"Destroy the Insect Department, the Golden God Department won't take care of it, right?" Ye Tian asked.

He Lao shook his head and said: "The Golden God Department will not care about the slaughter of the tribes under its command, but we occupy the territory of the Insect Department, and we need to hand over the offerings that the Insect Department should have handed over, as long as the resources are sufficient, the Golden God Department will not care." Of course, if the kind of tribe with a large number of emperor-level tribes kills each other, the Golden God Department will intervene, and the Golden God Department does not want to see a certain tribe grow in strength and threaten his position. "

"I see. "

Ye Tian also agreed to He Lao's suggestion and attacked the insect department.

Soon.

The king-level of the 867 Eagle Department gathered, plus a large number of general-level and soldier-level attacking insect departments.

The Worm Department had not yet received specific information, and when the Eagle Department approached, they reacted, but it was too late to escape.

In this battle, Ye Tian did not participate, and He Lao alone could easily kill the remaining kings of the Light Insect Department.

And Ye Tian stood there and watched, watching as a king-level elder of the Sect of Venerable Insects was killed, and countless living beings were wiped out.

After a while, all the insects were wiped out, and this territory was also occupied by the eagles.

However, the Eagle Department is currently unable to completely swallow the Insect Department's industry, so the patriarch Tsurukage talked to several nearby tribes and sold them some properties, and sold them at a very low price.

In this way, several nearby tribes are happy, and the Eagle Department does not need to send more people to manage these places.

Otherwise, there are not too many king-level guards, and it will not be good to be invaded by the wanderers.

Now this solution is a joy for all!

And the generals and soldiers who knew Ye Tian's strength within the Eagle Department were all ordered not to divulge Ye Tian's strength.

Therefore, Ye Tian's strength has not leaked out, and he can still cultivate in a low-key manner.

And the Eagle Department destroyed the Insect Department.,After this matter got out.,It's also made the major tribes a little jealous of the Eagle Department.。。
